$description: Composition patterns for contemplative experiences — moments where the portal invites the seeker to slow down, go deeper, and enter a more reflective state. These patterns embody the portal's spiritual purpose most directly.

dwell-mode.$description: DES-009: Passage Contemplation Mode. When a seeker lingers on a paragraph, the portal dims everything else and highlights just that passage. An invitation to contemplate, not a forced interaction.
dwell-mode.trigger: 1200ms settled in the focus zone (middle 30% of viewport)

tokens.active-paragraph: opacity.full (1.0) — the focused passage remains vivid
tokens.background-glow: gold subliminal (0.06) — barely-there warmth on the active paragraph

behavior.activation: automatic after settled debounce. Visual shift is the only indicator.
behavior.deactivation: scroll away, click elsewhere, or press 'd' to toggle
behavior.side-panel: related teachings panel appears (if not already visible)
behavior.mobile: dwell icon appears subtly near the paragraph, inviting deeper exploration

accessibility.screen-reader: aria-live='polite' announces 'Related teachings available for this passage'

quiet-corner.$description: A contextual contemplative space overlaying the current page. The seeker enters a pause — breathing space between reading sessions or when moved by a passage.
quiet-corner.register: ambient (the experience IS the absence of content)

tokens.background: theme.bg at full opacity (everything behind is hidden, not dimmed)
tokens.text: theme.text at secondary opacity — sparse, centered
tokens.content-behind: opacity 0.05 (nearly invisible — a ghost of the page, not a visible backdrop)

content.passage: A short contemplative passage (max 500 chars, REFLECTION_MAX_LENGTH)
content.ornament: lotus motif at decorative scale — use .motif-lotus.motif-decorative (see css/motifs.css)
content.guidance: optional one-line text: 'Sit quietly with this thought...'

behavior.exit: press Escape, click 'Return to reading', or any navigation

opening-moment.$description: DES-007: Portal Threshold. The first impression when a seeker arrives. Not a splash screen — a threshold crossing. Brief, beautiful, optional (skip on return visits).

content.passage: Today's Wisdom passage — a single contemplative excerpt

behavior.first-visit: full threshold experience with slow arrival
behavior.returning: abbreviated — greeting + quick passage, faster transition
behavior.skip: any scroll or click bypasses the threshold immediately

breath-between-chapters.$description: DES-012: Chapter Transition Pacing. When a seeker finishes one chapter and begins the next, there's a moment of pause — like turning a page in a physical book. Not a loading screen; a contemplative breath.

tokens.background: theme.bg (clean, empty space during the pause)

breath-between-chapters.temporal-rhythm: This pattern is a prāṇāyāma cycle — see reading-surface.pattern.json temporal-rhythm. Fade out = recaka (release, 300ms accelerate). Pause = kumbhaka (held stillness, 200-400ms). Fade in = pūraka (approach, 800ms decelerate). The sequence is a breath.
sequence: Chapter content fades out (300ms) — recaka: accelerate easing, release
Brief pause (pure background, 200-400ms) — kumbhaka: held stillness
New chapter content fades in (800ms) — pūraka: decelerate easing, approach
Drop capital and first paragraph appear last (slight delay for dramatic entrance)

session-closure.$description: DES-014: Departure Grace. When a seeker leaves the portal, the experience ends with intention, not abruptness. Like closing a book with a bookmark.

concept.gratitude: Simple, warm closing text — not 'Come back!' but 'Thank you for reading.'
concept.practice-bridge: Gentle pointer to SRF Lessons or meditation practice (PRI-04)

session-closure.note: Implementation deferred — captures the design intent for when departure moments are built.

haptic-dwell.$description: On supported mobile devices, a subtle haptic pulse when dwell mode activates. The seeker feels a gentle physical 'click' — like a book settling into a reading stand. Implemented in M2b stretch.
haptic-dwell.condition: only on touch devices with haptic support
